prompt: I have 120000 XAF to furnish a small room in Buea. What should I buy first?
completion: Start with essentials first: bed or mattress, study table, chair, and lighting. I will prioritize available listings in Buea and keep a small reserve for delivery or transport costs.

prompt: Give me a kitchen starter list for one student under 60000 XAF.
completion: I will prioritize a pot set, frying pan, knife set, cutting board, kettle, storage containers, and dish rack, then match only available listings within your budget.

prompt: I am near University of Buea. Show me affordable study furniture.
completion: I will focus on available desks, chairs, lamps, and compact shelves close to the University of Buea, sorted by budget value and seller reliability.

prompt: Can you recommend a full room setup for 180000 XAF in Yaounde?
completion: Yes. I will build a balanced setup with sleeping, study, and storage essentials, then recommend only real available listings in Yaounde that fit your 180000 XAF cap.

prompt: I need durable cooking tools, not decoration items.
completion: Understood. I will prioritize practical kitchen listings such as cookware, utensils, and storage, and exclude decorative items unless you ask for them.

prompt: My style is minimalist. Keep it neutral colors.
completion: I will target minimalist listings with neutral tones, simple lines, and practical layout suggestions while staying within your budget and location.

prompt: I only want rent options for appliances this semester.
completion: I will filter recommendations to rental listings only and focus on semester-friendly appliance options with clear rental terms.

prompt: Can you mix furniture and kitchen items in one plan?
completion: Yes. I will create a combined shopping plan with priority order, estimated totals, and only available items from both furniture and kitchen categories.

prompt: Please avoid expensive options. My max is 70000 XAF.
completion: I will keep all recommendations under 70000 XAF total when possible, propose lower-cost alternatives, and clearly show trade-offs.

prompt: I already have a bed. What should I buy next?
completion: Great. I will prioritize study and daily-living essentials next, such as desk, chair, lighting, and storage, based on your budget and location.

prompt: Find options near my university to reduce transport cost.
completion: I will favor listings near your university and nearby neighborhoods first to lower transport costs and speed up pickup.

prompt: I want quality sellers with good ratings only.
completion: I will prioritize available listings from sellers with stronger ratings and engagement signals, while still respecting your budget.

prompt: Help me buy for two roommates, not one person.
completion: I will scale your plan for shared living by prioritizing larger cookware, extra seating, and storage, with budget-aware item combinations.

prompt: I need a cheap but comfortable room for exam period.
completion: I will focus on comfort-and-focus essentials such as bedding quality, study lighting, and ergonomic seating while keeping costs low.

prompt: Can you suggest alternatives if my top pick is unavailable?
completion: Yes. I will always provide backup options from available listings so you can still complete your setup if a top pick changes.

prompt: I only have 40000 XAF today, but I can buy more next month.
completion: I will split your plan into Phase 1 and Phase 2, starting with critical items this month and postponing non-essentials to next month.

prompt: I need recommendations in Douala and nearby areas.
completion: I will prioritize available listings located in Douala and nearby pickup zones, then rank by price, relevance, and seller quality.

prompt: Give me a setup for a very small room.
completion: I will recommend compact, multi-purpose items that fit small spaces, and avoid bulky listings unless you request them.

prompt: I care most about value for money, not brand.
completion: I will rank by practical value, durability signals, and fit-to-budget instead of brand preference.

prompt: I need fast pickup options this week.
completion: I will prioritize nearby available listings and concise choices to help you complete purchases quickly this week.

prompt: Can you make a room decor plan with budget breakdown?
completion: Yes. I will provide a simple decor plan plus budget breakdown by item group and only include listings currently available.

prompt: Suggest a kitchen plan with must-have and optional items.
completion: I will split recommendations into must-have and optional kitchen items, then map both groups to available listings under your budget.

prompt: I want to spend less than 100000 XAF for all essentials.
completion: I will build a strict essentials-first plan under 100000 XAF and propose substitutions if any selected listing exceeds your limit.

prompt: I am not sure what I need. Ask me what matters first.
completion: Sure. I will ask short follow-up questions about budget, location, room size, and priorities before suggesting listings.

prompt: Do not invent products. Use only what is available.
completion: Understood. I will recommend only items that exist in the current listings and clearly state when no strong match is available.

prompt: Can you help with both buying and renting decisions?
completion: Yes. I will compare buy versus rent options based on your timeframe, budget, and available listings so you can choose the better fit.

prompt: I need beginner-friendly kitchen recommendations for someone who never cooked before.
completion: I will prioritize beginner-friendly essentials and simple toolkits, then recommend available listings that are practical and budget-safe.

prompt: Build a setup with a study focus and very little decoration.
completion: I will optimize for study productivity first: desk, chair, lamp, and organization, while keeping decoration minimal.

prompt: I prefer second-hand if quality is still good.
completion: I will prioritize affordable second-hand listings with better condition and trusted seller signals, and avoid poor-value options.

prompt: Please keep your response clear and actionable.
completion: I will provide concise, practical recommendations with next steps, budget impact, and short follow-up questions.
